title: Nursing Aide
description:
The jobholder supports and assists the RN/ENs in the delivery of care to patients in the nursing home in accordance to established policies and procedures, standards of nursing care and practices.

Job Description

  • Provide direct patient care including hygiene, feeding, mobility support, and comfort, in accordance with approved nursing standards.
  • Monitor, record, and report patients’ vital signs, conditions, and needs to the nurse in charge promptly.
  • Ensure patient safety, infection control, and a clean, safe environment within the nursing home.
  • Assist nurses in clinical care activities, including medication administration support, catheter care, admissions, and rehabilitation exercises.
  • Maintain accurate documentation and accompany patients for medical appointments, therapy, or outings when required.
  • Respond to emergencies appropriately, escalate concerns to nurses, and support clinical projects or additional duties as assigned.

Requirements
GCE ‘N’ Level with completion of one of the following:

  • WSQ Higher Certificate / Advanced Certificate in Healthcare Support (Nursing Care), or
  • ITE Approved Training Centre (ATC) Healthcare (Home Care) programme, or
  • Nitec in Nursing
  • Able to work 12-hour shifts, including 3 rotating shifts
  • Relevant healthcare experience in a nursing home or care setting is an advantage

Application
Please forward your updated resume/CV to abdul_qayyum@thknh.org.sg, indicating the position applied for in the email subject.

postedCompany.description:
THYE HUA KWAN NURSING HOME LIMITED

HEALTHCARE/ LIFE SCIENCES/ BIOMEDICAL/ PHARMACEUTICAL/ MEDICAL SERVICES

Thye Hua Kwan Nursing Home @ Hougang will serve 285 residents, including 114 residents with dementia.  We believe in providing the best quality of life for aging Singaporeans and will strive to facilitate aging in the community. To do that, the Nursing Home will consider all psychosocial, physical, medical and emotional aspects of our clients and create a tranquil, person-centred and safe environment for them.

With our mission "To serve Mankind", Thye Hua Kwan endeavors to help anyone who needs help with full respect to their race, creed, language, culture and religion, to assist them in every way possible.
